  Multiple installations found ⚠
  ├ npm-global at /usr/local/bin/claude
  └ native at ~/.local/bin/claude

  Installation warnings ⚠
  ├ macOS Keychain is not writable (add-generic-password failed).
  └ Run: security unlock-keychain ~/Library/Keychains/login.keychain-db

  Updates ⚠
  ├ Auto-updates: disabled (set by env: DISABLE_AUTOUPDATER)
  └ Stable version: 2.1.179

  Remote Control ✔
  └ Control this session from claude.ai/code or the Claude mobile app

  Version locks ✔
  └ 2.1.179: PID 67890 (running)

  clode: search-applet version skew — these commands will fail until you upgrade the host tool:
    /find: host bfs rejects flags Claude's bundled bfs uses — bfs: error.

  Still having issues? Run /feedback to report details.

  Enter to close · f to fix with Claude
